span.p:
Resolve detection model
must exist and be loaded

div.style: color: rgb(36, 18, 63) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Store StreamState
labels, sensitivity, max_objects,
stop conditions, callback URL,
optional source_code

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Frame input paths
/api/streams/{id}/frames
/api/streams/{id}/url
camera relay when source_code matches

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
STATE_LOCK
active stream, model still loaded,
process_every_ms throttle

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Save JPEG and retain frame
append FrameRecord, prune old frames

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Return JSON
stream + frame reference + detection text

div.style: color: rgb(16, 32, 51) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(91, 52, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Publish event payload
detection or stream_stopped
